/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock_main.so -o ../lib/libgmock_main.so CMakeFiles/gmock_main.dir/src/gmock_main.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/nomeer/NoMeEr/Robotics/Courses/Robotics Corner/ROS/Tasks/Task_3/control_nomeer_roboot_ws/build/gtest/lib" ../lib/libgmock.so ../lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
